_comment: Personal info that gets auto-filled into every affiliate signup. Edit values once, autopilot reuses for all 14 programs.
audience_description: AI Tools Empire (aitoolsempire.co) — daily reviews + comparisons of AI tools for solopreneurs, content creators, freelancers. 96 published articles, growing weekly. Email list + Twitter audience. Honest reviews-first style.
promotional_methods: Long-form blog reviews, comparison articles, social posts on X/Twitter, email newsletter, YouTube reviews
audience_categories: AI tools, content creation, side hustle, small business, freelance, productivity
why_promote: I review AI tools for a living. When a tool genuinely solves a real problem at a fair price, I write an honest review. Affiliate relationships let me link readers to tools I'd recommend regardless.
tax_form_status: W9 not yet submitted — fill manually when prompted
bio_short: I run AI Tools Empire (aitoolsempire.co), a daily AI-tool review site. 96 published articles. Email list growing.
bio_long: Kenneth Bonnet — solopreneur running AI Tools Empire, a review site for AI tools used by content creators and small business owners. Site launched March 2026, 96 articles published, weekly cadence. Daily Twitter content via @AiTools_Empire. Active in indie hacker and side-hustle communities.
